entry.title: SAP IBP Configuration - Create a planning level in SAP IBP
entry.content:
In SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP), a planning level defines the granularity at which data is analyzed and planned. It is a crucial component that determines how detailed the planning data will be. Here are some key aspects of planning levels:

  • Attributes: Planning levels are based on attributes derived from master data types, such as product, customer, or location.
  • Granularity: They enable users to plan and analyze data at different levels of detail, from broad categories like product groups to specific details like individual SKUs.
  • Data Storage: Each planning level is defined for a planning area and determines the level at which data is saved.
  • Aggregation: Planning levels allow for data aggregation and disaggregation, facilitating various types of analysis and forecasting.

For example, a planning level might be set at the product and customer level, allowing you to analyze sales forecasts for specific products sold to specific customers.

 

 

Planning Level vs Time Profile

In SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP), planning levels and time profiles serve different purposes but are both essential for effective planning.

Planning Levels

  • Granularity: Planning levels define the granularity of the data, such as product, location, or customer.
  • Attributes: They are based on attributes from master data types and determine the level of detail for planning and analysis.
  • Aggregation: Planning levels allow for data aggregation and disaggregation, enabling detailed or summarized views.

Time Profiles

  • Time Dimensions: Time profiles define the time dimensions used in planning, such as days, weeks, months, and years.
  • Hierarchy: They establish a hierarchy of time buckets, ensuring continuous and non-overlapping periods.
  • Customization: Time profiles can be customized to fit specific planning needs, allowing for different time buckets and periods.

In summary, planning levels focus on the detail and attributes of the data, while time profiles focus on the time dimensions and hierarchy of the planning periods.

1. In the Model Configuration group, choose the Planning Areas Model Configuration tile.

2. Choose your planning area in the list and choose the Planning Levels tab.

3. Choose New, and select the Lowest Time Profile Level, and choose OK.

4. Enter ID and Description.

5. In the Attributes section, choose Add. Select the checkbox to the left of the master data type attributes, and choose Add.

6. Choose Save.

 

Base Planning Level

The base planning level determines on what level planning data will be created.

You need to make sure that the non-time root attributes of the base planning level and the required attributes of the master data type included in the configuration are exactly the same. If you select a base planning level that has only a subset of the attributes, the system may generate inconsistent data.

entry.title: Re: Unlocking Hashmap Magic: Efficient Bulk Data Lookup with Value Mapping in SAP CI using Groovy/XS
entry.content:
Hello @AmanVarshney ,

For XSLT approach, I had to add string() fn on my key variable to make it work.

 Sample XSLT Code:

 

<countryCode>
	<xsl:variable name="key" select="string(countryCode/text())"/>
	<key>
		<xsl:value-of select="$key"/>
	</key>
	<value>
		<xsl:value-of select="map:get($hashmapOutput,$key)" xmlns:map="java:java.util.Map"/>
	</value>
</countryCode>

 

 

 Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Analytic Model was created with older version of the editor
entry.content: I would like to inform you about a regression issue we are currently experiencing. Unfortunately, this regression affects both our development (DEV) and production (PROD) environments. While reporting remains functional, it is no longer possible to modify AMs. This situation complicates things even more for AMs that are currently under development, as they have not yet been documented to allow their recreation. I took the initiative to contact SAP to explore the possibility of desynchronizing their updates between the DEV and PROD tenants. My goal was to avoid any impact on production and to be able to block a regressive update. Unfortunately, SAP's response to this request was negative.

cmd that gave error: cf deploy mta_archives/todo_1.0.0.mtar

Then replaced push with deploy, and it wokred fine!

entry.title: Integration to a BTP destination in SAP Build Apps is not working
entry.content:
I am trying to Integrate a SAP BTP Destination in SAP Build Apps.

All the destination configured in the BTP -Destinations is shown but when I try to use the destination for the API ( ODATA ) Integration, it gives 404 response.

I am trying to use the ES5 Product API and the link that I am using is 

"https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/SEPMRA_PROD_MAN/".

I have attached the error and BTP destination screenshot.

Thanks in advance !

entry.title: '%20' prefix is coming while calling the mashup in sap c4c
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have configured a URL mashup to open s4 t-code using port binding Ticket Information and request parameter.

Now while previewing the mashup prefix '%20' is coming in every parameter. Due to that I am not able to open the URL and showing an invalid transaction error.

However, I have configured the same URL mashup with custom port binding where '%20' prefix is not coming for that and URL also opening.

Please help me find what I am missing. Why prefix is coming for standard port binding not in custom port binding.

 

SAP Cloud SDK SAP Sales Cloud SAP Service Cloud SAP Cloud Applications Studio C4C Extensibility

this must have something to do with the storage type customizing SPRO -> EWM -> Master Data -> Define storage type 

I think in your storage type WH00 is mixed stock not allowed on one bin.

What is the result if you leave <ls_create_whr_putaway>-nlber empty? Would the system find another bin? 

 

Regards

Florian

entry.title: Re: No direct postings can be made to G/L acct. 50000020 in CoCode 3000 When creating A PO
entry.content:
Dear Dominik,

Yes, The G/L is allowing only automatic postings only. How to solve this issue without untick the option. Is there any option to go forward bcz, this is material consumption G/L.

entry.title: Re: No direct postings can be made to G/L acct. 50000020 in CoCode 3000 When creating A PO
entry.content: This error usually occurs because the G/L account 50000020 is set to block direct postings. You may need to check the account settings in FS00 or consult with your FI team to see if the account can be adjusted. Alternatively, you can use a different G/L account that allows postings for material POs or update the account assignment category in the PO.

entry.title: Re: Triggering SAP Build Process Automation Processes from SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) A
entry.content:
Hi Alexandar,

Thanks a lot for the quick response. Yes, you are right! I have now successfully created the event project after correcting the type to "object" and setup the webhook in event mesh accordingly. And I do see the events acquired in the Acquired Events in monitoring of SBPA. So this means I guess the event is well delivered to SBPA events endpoint. But seems the process in SBPA is not getting triggered by the event (which is included in the process as Wait for Event trigger). Manually trigger this event trigger in Environment public in Control Tower with empty body can actually trigger the process. I don't know which part is wrong...

Thanks again!

Best regards,

Kun

entry.title: SAPUI5 - Controller function not call after change the view setting of macros table
entry.content:
I have create a fragment.xml file to config my macros table like this:

<core:FragmentDefinition
xmlns="sap.m"
xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros"
xmlns:macrosTable="sap.fe.macros.table"
>
<Dialog title="Dialog" id="idDialog">
<macros:FilterBar
metaPath="@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.SelectionFields"
id="FilterBar"
liveMode="true"
/>
<macros:Table
id="DialogTable"
metaPath="changes/@UI.PresentationVariant#Dialog"
personalization="true"
readOnly="true"
isSearchable="true"
enableExport="true"
disableCopyToClipboard="true"
enableAutoColumnWidth="true"
headerVisible="false"
filterBar="FilterBar"
ignoredFields="up__ID"
>
<macros:columns>
<macrosTable:Column
header="Link"
id="link"
importance="High"
width="auto"
horizontalAlign="Begin"
key="link_id"
>
<Link
text="Currency"
press="onLinkPress"
/>
</macrosTable:Column>
</macros:columns>
</macros:Table>

</Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>


The function onLinkPress is define in a controller which load this fragment. It still call onLinkPress success when open, reset or search in the dialog
 
But when I try to remove this link column from the dialog using column setting in personalization dialog and then add it again, the link not working, it not call the controller function

entry.title: Re: Reimagining digital learning as an integrated part of a Digital Adoption Platform with SAP &&&&
entry.content:
@MaheshSonawane 

As stated in the blog, while new customer sales for SAP Enable Now, cloud edition, and the SAP Enable Now on premise editions will cease in Q2, 2025, ongoing support and updates will continue. 

I will update the blog with further information about transitioning options once they become available.

entry.title: Re: Define shipping data for Plants (STO)
Re: SF - Time Sheet - Recording of Allowances
entry.content: Good Day @cassiopeia, Change your Business Rule from "Basic" Scenario to "Rules for MDF Based Objects" and check this again. In general, avoid creating Business Rules with the "Basic" Scenario from now on, SAP does not support them. Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: No direct postings can be made to G/L acct. 50000020 in CoCode 3000 When creating A PO
entry.content:
This should be an automatic account, check in your MM-FI Customizing for this account (table T030) that there should be a valuation class with this account for some transaction key such as GBB (OBYC).

  • Have you tried to use a material with this valuation class?
  • What is the exact use of the account 50000020 in your company (example : is this a Good Issue account, using it on a purchase order will not be legitimate, check with functional and legal constraints)?

entry.title: Re: Triggering SAP Build Process Automation Processes from SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) A
entry.content:
Hi @kun_wu ,

glad to hear that you were able to create the event project.

First, you should check if BPA has returned any errors to your webhook. For that, open your message client, select "Webhooks" and click on "Details" under the actions button. There you should see if there has been any failed delivery. If there was none, it will say "Not applicable".

If there was no issue, you should make sure that you include the correct messageType ("newSuppInvReceived" in your case) as a header parameter in the messaging.emit function.

 

Best regards, Alexander

entry.title: BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE multiple account assignment
entry.content:
Dear(s),

Context:
We develop a tool to post incoming invoices (like MIRO).
We prepare the import table of the BAPI: BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE1

Our issue:
PO-item is defined as multi account assignment.
We don't know how to prepare the ITEMDATA[] table expected by the BAPI.

Based on ITEMDATA[] table, is there a function module or a class/method that suggests the account assignment table ACCOUNTINGDATA[] ?
If it does not exist, how can I handle the distribution of the quantity/amount ?

In advance, thanks for your comment !

Best regards.

The "and" function produces a true value to the "createIf" function but the output from there on is null. This results in the Address field not being created. Do you have any input here?

entry.title: Re: Leveraging API Traffic Predictions in SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Row table memory leak on Hana 2.0
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

When checking the database with minicheck, I found that there is a warning in M0426 (Row store table leak size), I use sql Hana_Memory_TopConsumers to check the memory situation,it shows that there is 208GB of garbage collection fragments in my system (Ext.Frag.Garb.)
Check note 1999993, mention note 2362759 2169283, where 2362759 does not match my system (the system version does not match and the result of step 6 is different),
Note 2169283 I don't know how to use it, how do I need to check further to confirm the cause?

 

Minicheck result

CHIDDESCRIPTIONHOSTVALUEEXPECTED_VALUECSAP_NOTE
M0423Heap areas with potential memory leak nonenone 1999997
M0425Pool/RowEngine/CpbTree leak size (GB) 0.08<= 20.00 1999997
M0426Row store table leak size (GB) 208.11<= 20.00X2362759

 

TopConsumers

HOSTPORTAREASUBAREADETAILCOUNTGAL_GBSIZE_GBSIZE_PCT
any  anyCOLUMNColumn Store (Main)any1244641933.59762.1639.41
any  anyROWRow Store (Ext. Frag. Garb.)any11933.59208.110.76
any  anyHEAPHeap (System)any12091933.5940.372.08

entry.title: Re: Finding the right CDS Extractor in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Vipin,

if CDC is missing, it might be for different reasons:
1) Full load is regarded as feasible/accepted, CDC is not required. E.g. for most MD loads.
2) Maybe there is a timestamp/date in the source available, and a generic delta is possible.
Guidance: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/cds-based-data-extraction-part-ii-delta-handling/ba-p/13425761
3) Maybe the source data model is too complex and CDC cannot be provided.
4) SAP might still be working on it
Please check the URL above how to set up your own CDC delta handling.

KR Frank

in GRC prod-igp system, when appprover or security team trying to click on comment button, its throwing "500  internal server error".

exception CX_WDR_ADAPTER_EXCEPTION occured because of error :Error in FORMATTED_TEXT_VIEW "FORMATTED_TEXT_VIEW"of view "GRFN_NOTES_HISTORY.MAIN_VIEW" URL is not

entry.title: Certifications for Project Managers
entry.content:
There are two certification for Project Managers:

SAP Certified Associate - Project Manager - SAP Activate

Preparation: Discovering SAP Activate - Implementation Tools and Methodology and  Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery

SAP Certified Specialist - Project Manager - SAP Activate for Agile Implementation Management

Preparation: Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery

The second is a higher level certification but it has the same learning journey as the first. Does this (Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery) learning journey really cover both certification or are there others which can be used for the preparation?

entry.title: Re: SAP User Experience Q1/2025 Update – Part 1: Many New Innovations Available (AI, Joule and More)
entry.content: What's the difference between SAP Start and SAP Build Work Zone standard edition ?

entry.title: Datasphere Internal error: SQL View - Resource governor for 'cursors' exceeded
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have define an SQL View which uses a few local table variables to split up the logic and returns a union of these temporary tables.

Whenever I attempt to preview the result, I run into the following error:

internal error: Error opening the cursor for the remote database <DWC_BWBRIDGESPACE.BWBRIDGE> [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB SO][HDBODBC] General error;403 internal error: An error occurred while opening the cursor for the remote database. The server name: "DWCHDL2" [SAP][ODBC Driver][SAP HANA Cloud, data lake Relational Engine]Resource governor for 'cursors' exceededThe problematic query: "SELECT

If return each of table variables on their own, the error doesn't appear and I can preview the data just fine.How can I debug this further? Is there a parameter I can check to see where the issue may be coming from?

entry.title: Re: Triggering SAP Build Process Automation Processes from SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) A
entry.content:
Hi Alexander,

I don't see any failed delivery. Here is the screenshot:

And I have included the message type when emitting the message in my CAP:

await eventEmitter.emit
({
event: 'newSuppInvReceived',
data: invoice,
headers: { type: 'newSuppInvReceived' },
});
 
Cheers,
Kun

entry.title: As a Manager or new hire, I should be able to take photos of I-9 documents directly SuccessFactors
entry.content:
As a  Manager or new hire, I should be able to take photos of I-9 documents directly through SuccessFactors so that photos dont have to be saved on work/personal devices or faxed to HR Support. Having I-9 documents scanned/faxed or saved on devices poses a security.

Acceptance Criteria: Enable the photo capability through SuccessFactors so pictures can be loaded for HR to review

entry.title: B1IF Scenario to create PDF file and use it in next step ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I have created a scenario to send PDF doc to API call .so first i create a pdf file using Crystal report atom then i convert the PDF to Base 64 using .net call .Here the problem what am facing is .net atom triggers before the file generated so the error is file not found .But i can see the file after the scenario end . also i tried delay login in .net but file saved only  after all process done .is thr any way to save the file in middle step .

Regards

jaba

entry.title: Re: Prevent reprinting the Payment Advice in F110 on S4HC?
entry.content:
Dear MED10,

Thank you for your question. Actually, the PDF icon in your screenshot is used for preview of the PDF file of payment advices, rather than for downloading. The output items section is mainly used for monitoring output request status and relevant parameters.

The printout of payment advices uses the backend printing function. In your screenshot, the status of the first entry for printout is "Completed", which indicates that the PDF is already in the print queue. What you need to do is connect the print queue to your local printer, and print the PDF using the printer. The PDFs in the print queue are only printed once. After the printing, they will be deleted automatically, and will not be printed repeatedly.

For more information, see Before Getting Started | SAP Help Portal.

Kind regards,

Sharon

entry.title: Re: Sap Customer Checkout Article sync error "Error while...
entry.content: Dear Gunther , Thanks for your suggested KBA 0003120095 and yes it has sorted my issues . Appreciated your help as always .Thanks and Best Regards , Tharindu .

entry.title: Re: Manage Documents Feature
entry.content: Hi Parul, is it possible to store also Recruitment documents in the Document Manager tool of SAP SF itself? If yes, is it possible to have a direct storage interface without using onboarding module?

entry.title: Re: SMB Adapter for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
@Thimo 

Currently the SMB adapter supports Cloud runtime for publically available SMB servers and EIC runtime for on premise servers. Cloud Connector is not yet supported for the adapter.

entry.title: Getting 'ILLEGAL_PARAMETER_TYPE' error while trying to read an ADSO using RSDRI_INFOPROV_READ_RFC
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to read an ADSO using 'RSDRI_INFOPROV_READ_RFC' in an SAP BW/4HANA 2.0 system. 

We have observed that any ADSO containing a Characteristic field of type 'String' is failing with the error 'ILLEGAL_PARAMETER_TYPE'. The error is coming from 'fill_container_c  ' and the l_type_value  is 'v'. 

Does this mean RSDRI_INFOPROV_READ_RFC does not support to read ADSOs with complex data type? Is there any alternative to this?

entry.title: In which case we write groovy for removing root node&child nodes
Re: Transportation Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 (FPS02) - What's new?
entry.content:
I have a question on the load plan topic.

Its evident from the images that you are able to use load builder to plan loose product. I have only been able to get load builder to work with packages. For example, I can plan with any material defined with 
GenItemCatGroup: VERP, but when I try and plan with GenItemCatGroup: NORM it refuses to put it on the truck. 

We also found that cylinder packages on a pallet are displayed in the load plan prior to loading, but when loaded they are still displayed in the unloaded position, although the pallet and any box shaped packages in it are shown in the vehicle and it reads as if loaded in the hierarchy.

Thanks for any hints on this.

entry.title: Re: Stock Consumption of Packaging Material
entry.content: Check in OMS2 as to whether for the combination of plant and material type, quantity update box is ticked.  From your post, it seems, it is not ticked.

entry.title: Re: Standard BAPI BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE copy
entry.content:
The item document numbers are returned at the end of the BAPI (after the MB_POST_GOODS_MOVEMENT form has been run).
and so must have been calculated beforehand.

  • As I've always added my ZZ fields at the end of the standard tables, I've never had to solve this problem.
  • You could try to debug BAPI execution, defining a watchpoint on variable XMKPF-MBLNR or a break-point in  FM NUMBER_GET_NEXT ?
  • or you could use some PERFORM ON COMMIT and some assign to XMKPF record 1

entry.title: How to Enable Wildcard Filtering in Search Lists – Cloud Studio SDK
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a development in the Cloud Studio SDK and have encountered a limitation in search lists. While I was able to add a new filter for search functionality, I noticed that it does not support wildcard searches using "*".

For example, instead of requiring users to enter the full value (e.g., "Material001"), we would like them to be able to search using a prefix or suffix with a wildcard (e.g., "MAT"). This would allow the system to return all selections containing the sequence "MAT" within them. However, in the current setup, users must input the exact ID to retrieve a result, making searches less flexible.

#cloudstudio #bydesign

entry.title: SF Compensation - Planner Audit for Salary Notes
entry.content:
We are using the Planner Audit functionallity and are facing an issue regarding Salary Notes.

We have activated the "Enable Planner Audit" under Settings and have selected 8 fields of our template to be auditable. For 7 out of this 8 fields, this is working well and we can see the changes when we open the Change History. However, for the field "Salary Notes", this is not working and changes are not shown. 

What could be the issue, what needs to be done to see the changes for Salary Notes in the Change History?

entry.title: Manufacturing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
As SAP continues to refine its cloud offerings, the 2502 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition brings a suite of enhancements specifically tailored for the Manufacturing line of business. This release focuses on enriching features across Production Engineering, Production Planning, Extended Production Planning, Production Operations, and Quality Management. Here's a look of the most important innovations of what's new:

 

Production Engineering 

Process Production Versions: Background Mass Edit

You can now perform background mass edit for the existing production versions. This type of mass edit runs in the background during which you can perform various other actions including mass edits for production versions.
You now have the option to select two types of mass edits:

Foreground

Foreground type does not allow you to perform any actions on the production versions until the mass edit is complete.

Background

Background type allows you to perform actions on the production versions during the mass edit. These actions include create, mass edit, lock, unlock, check, and delete for production versions.

This is the new button for mass edits: 

Process Production Versions - Mass Edit

Here you can see the new mass edit types: 

Process Production Versions - Mass Edit Types

 

Production Planning 

Manage Material Coverage - Planning Time Fence

The stock / requirements list of the Manage Material Coverage (F0251A) app now includes information about the planning time fence or manual firming date of a material.

Manage Material Coverage - Planning Time Fence

You can use a planning time fence to protect procurement proposals from automatic changes during the MRP planning run. If a planning time fence is defined in the material master data or for the MRP group a material is assigned to, the system can automatically firm the following types of receipt elements, depending on the firming type of the material:
• Purchase Requisitions
• Planned Orders
• Delivery Schedule Lines
The same applies to materials with a manual firming date. If the manual firming date is after the end of the planning time fence, the system uses this date to determine which elements are firmed. For materials with a planning time fence or manual firming date, the stock / requirements list in the Manage Material Coverage (F0251A) app now displays a separate row to indicate that a planning time fence or manual firming date is assigned, and to provide information about the corresponding dates. This way, you can easily check which elements have been firmed automatically, because their availability date is before the end of the planning time fence or manual firming date. If you want to adapt the manual firming date for a material, you can also edit it directly from the new row. The changes are immediately reflected in the stock / requirements list.

Capacity Scheduling Board

With this feature, you can now personalize and save a Gantt variant of your app. 

Capacity Scheduling Board - Personalized Variant Settings

This will enable you to save your specific settings for the app every time you want to access it. The settings that can be saved for a personalized variant are the Work Center drop down, Gantt settings, and Work Center settings. These settings are also carried over to the Order Details page and the Manage Operations page. 

Capacity Scheduling Table

With this feature, you can now retain the sequence of displayed orders after a realign operation. This can be done by selecting the Realign Sequence of Orders checkbox in the Realign Schedules window.

Realign Schedules - Retain Sequence of Orders

This functionality is only available when Insert Operation is selected as the Scheduling Control and Future is selected as the Offset. If you are realigning an order with this checkbox selected, to a date where there is already a dispatched order, then the Operation Start for the realigned order will be after the Operation End of the existing dispatched order.

Watch this short demo: 

Capacity Scheduling Table - Demo

 

Mass Maintenance of Products (DD)

With this feature, you can edit Product Specific Parameters on a product level by selecting the Edit button.

Mass Maintenance of Products (DD)

 

You can add these columns to the Product details page by clicking the Settings wheel and selecting the columns. The columns that are added are Product Spike Horizon Constant, Product Spike Horizon Multiplier, and Product Spike Threshold Factor.

 

Replenishment Planning Details

 

Schedule Buffer Proposal Calculation 

With this feature, you can override the default calculation for Buffer Level Zones using the Buffer Level Zone Update (DD_BUFFERLEVELZONE) Business Add-In. 

DD_BUFFERLEVELZONE Business Add-In

Once this Business Add-In (BAdI) is activated, you would be able to view the Custom buffer level zone calculation for products section in Step 3 while creating a proposal in the Schedule Buffer Proposal Calculation app. You can also view further details about the Business Add-In (BAdI) adopted proposals in the Manage Buffer Levels app. Check out this short demo video of how it's done: 

Schedule Buffer Proposal Calculation - Demo

 

Convert Actions in Planned Order (OData V4)

With this feature, two new convert actions, namely Convert to Process Order and Convert to Production Order has been provided with the Planned Order (OData V4) API. 

Planned Order - ODATAV4

 

You can use the above to convert a Planned Order to a Process Order or a Production Order. This feature will not automatically be available in your system but requires that you activate the feature Convert Actions in Planned Order (OData (V4) (S4HC_FTGL_PLND_ORD_RAP_BO) in the configuration activity Activate Features. 

 

Production Execution & Control 

Joule 

​Joule is now generally available and seamlessly integrated in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition after being in early adoption. SAP’s AI copilot Joule leverages generative AI to empower users to execute their everyday tasks more efficiently and use natural language to express their business need.

The Business Objects in Manufacturing that have been enabled with 2502 are the following: 

  • Production Order Confirmation
  • Production Order
  • Production Routing

For further business objects that are on the way, please check this note: 3545050 - List of Business Objects Enabled for Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP for Me

For those that want to watch two short teaser demos, here is the one on Production Order: 

Joule Production Order - Demo

 

And here the one for the Production Order Confirmations: 

Joule - Production Order Confirmations - Demo

 

 

Schedule ATP Run for Production/Planned Orders

The Schedule ATP Run for Production/Planned Orders app (F3456) has been enhanced and can now also be used for process orders. Therefore, it has been renamed to Schedule Collective Availability Check for Orders (F3456). 

Schedule Collective Availability Check for Orders

Items Based on ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model: Editable Co-Products and other Order Features

Enable modification of a production order or process order using a business object interface of the ABAP RESTful application programming model. You can now create, change, or delete co-products as order items. 

Enhanced Production Order Extensibility

Based on ABAP RESTful Programming Model, Post Production Order Confirmations with Goods Movements Using Proposal Data

Enable modification of a production order confirmation as a business object of ABAP RESTful application programming model.

Development Production Order Confirmation Extensibility

OData API Integration of Production Orders: Adding or Removing Serial Numbers

Enhancement of OData APIs for production orders so that you can enable changing production orders by adding or removing serial numbers.

 Enhancement of OData API for production orders for adding or removing serial numbers.

 

Quality Management 

Manage Certificate Receipts

This feature provides the flexibility to manually create certificate receipts within the Manage Certificate Receipts app, enhancing traceability and ensuring quality documentation is in place, even prior to physical goods receipt.

Check out this short demo for more information: 

 

Manage Certificate Receipts - Demo

My colleague Leonie has written a dedicated Quality Management release update blog post for all innovations: Quality Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edi... - SAP Community

If you want to have further details including watching our AI use case in action, please check out this Expert Talk: 


In conclusion, the 2502 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition brings forth powerful enhancements that drive operational efficiencies and augment planning, scheduling, and quality management capabilities. This suite of new features within the Manufacturing line of business demonstrates SAP's commitment to evolving its cloud ERP platform in alignment with industry needs and customer feedback. These tailored tools will undoubtedly empower manufacturers to operate with greater agility and precision in today's dynamic industrial landscape.


📽 Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.  

  🔎 Find All of Our Assets   

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Planned Independent Requirement not consumed by withdrawal quantity in S/4
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

I had a PIR on February, being consumed by withdrawal quantity.

I deleted the PIR and created a new one (MD61).

Withdrawal quantity is still displayed in MD73 but doesn't consume anymore the PIR I've just created.

Any idea why?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Notification Cause and Damage Code Reporting
entry.content: Try IW69 with no filters but if you have it too wide open it may fail due to the data size

entry.title: Slow message processing sometimes - NAST
entry.content:
Hello guys,

our problem is that message processing is sometimes slow.

Most messages are fast proceeded like 0-1 second.
But then there are messages again and again, slow messages with 10 seconds, 1-2 minute, or more.
For example this is delaying printing for minutes.

Time span between ERUHR and UHRVR (table NAST).
Independent from media (print, mail, idoc), sendoption = 4 (direct sending).

In SQL cache the response time for queries to NAST are only milliseconds.
There is also no bottleneck for workprocesses.

do you have any recommendations where to analyze?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Message Mapping Issue: Handling Empty & Null...
entry.content: Hi again, i created to mapping regarding your needs. You can take the part what do you need. If you provide me to sample XML and XSD's i can clarify more spesific. But If you create mapping same as mine it will be return what your expected behavior.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Environment in BTP: Handling API Timeout for Lon...
entry.content: As you are using a destination (cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination )), you can also specify a timeout in the destination: go to transaction SM59, open the destination used here and then modify the timeout on the "Special Options" tab.

entry.title: How to resolve the error KI280 "Define a cost element category for account &1 (controlling area &2)"
entry.content:
When I do migration for G/L balance and open item I faced the error "Define a cost element category for account & (controlling area *) ".

Below G/L accounts are affected. They are created additionally by copying the exisiting accounts in YCOA. They all belong to G/L account Type "Non Operating Expense or Income "

Can you help me resolve this issue.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to resolve the error KI280 "Define a cost element...
entry.content:
The account being referred to is a profit and loss account, which means it is used to record revenues and expenses, ultimately determining the net profit or loss for a specific period. This account has been assigned to an object within the cost accounting module. These objects can include various entities such as a cost center, which is a department or function within an organization; an order, which could be a specific job or task; a project, which is a temporary endeavor with a defined beginning and end; or a profitability segment, which is a part of the organization for which profitability is measured.

When an account is assigned to any of these cost accounting objects, it is essential to ensure that a corresponding cost element category exists for the account within the designated controlling area. The controlling area is an organizational unit within the SAP system that represents a closed system used for cost accounting purposes.

To verify or create the necessary cost element category for the account, you should use transaction FS00 in the SAP system. Within this transaction, navigate to the 'Control Data' section. This area allows you to manage and configure the necessary settings to ensure that the account is properly categorized and can be used effectively within the cost accounting framework.

To resolve this problem, define a cost element category for account and post again or delete the auxiliary account assignment to objects in cost accounting.

With profitability segment assignment, the error message is only displayed when account-based profitability analysis is activated. Here it may be a good idea to suppress the error message and ignore the account assignment during the posting. This is particularly the case when the posting is not only relevant for the result from the usual business activity, for example for interest from cross-company sales in a billing document. Such postings should not be taken into consideration in the profitability analysis. In order to do this, you can define the account in transaction FCO_COPA_EX_N (IMG -> Controlling -> General Controlling -> Account Assignment Logic -> Exceptions for Postings to Profitability Segment).

Regards

entry.title: Re: DRC - no data selected by "Switzerland VAT return (CH...
entry.content: can you tell if you used the Report Definition: CH_VAT_DCL_2019_V0 standard or did you have to make an extension to use another field for the tax amount?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Environment in BTP: Handling API Timeout for Lon...
entry.content: No SM59 in BTP.

entry.title: SF Compensation - Executive Review: Filter Option Form View
entry.content:
For one of our Compensation Planning processes, we are using the Second Manager Hierarchy. In the Executive Review, with the Standard Filters, it is possible to filter by Team View (Second Manager). There could be cases where this is not reflecting the Form View (e.g. if a Second Manager has been updated, but the employee has not been moved from one form to the other). 

Therefore, we are thinking of activating the form view under Advanced Settings, which will disable the team view. In a KBA ("2084808 - Executive Review - Enable form view (This will disable team view) - Compensation"), it says that this is not a recommended option for clients. 

Why is this stated? What are the downsides of this option respectively what do we have to be aware of?

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with SAP SNC for RFC integrations
entry.content:
As things go mad with product naming, the CommonCryptoLib 8.x (CCL) is often still referred as SAPCRYPTOLIB and the archive shipping the CCL is still named SAPCRYPTOLIB_*.SAR.

If the archive name starts with SAPCRYPTOLIB_8 you are retrieving the CCL 8.x and are good to go. The deprecated SAPCRYPTOLIB 5.5 can only be downloaded from the archive section of SAP Software Center.

BR Joe

entry.title: Re: ABAP Environment in BTP: Handling API Timeout for Lon...
entry.content: I still have the issue even with `i_timeout = -1`. Are there any other parameters I need to adjust?

entry.title: Re: SAP on Windows server 2025
entry.content:
SAP has been testing its products internally on Windows Server 2025 for several months, but it needs to consider the recently released final version and perform final validation.

It is expected to be supported by SAP in Q2 2025.

SAP PAM is the official channel for verifying compatibility within SAP systems.  Once Windows Server 2025 is supported , the information will be updated in    PAM Tool.

entry.title: Alternate to Warehouse managed Physical inventory process
entry.content:
For WMS we use four apps to complete the physical inventory procedure.

Create - > Enter count -> Confirm count/Post -> Confirm differences

We have a requirement to reduce the user intervention and make a one step process for the same.

Is there any other way we can do the same process with lesser steps/is there any way we can have 1 single app to do all the processes?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Alternate to Warehouse managed Physical inventory pro...
entry.content:
WM Physical inventory use movement type 711/712 to increase/decrease EWM stock.

It is possible to increase/decrease EWM stock with single step but the movement types can be different.

Option  1: APP Post Goods Issue - Unplanned (APP ID /SCWM/ADGI)

Option 2: APP Post Goods Movement (APP ID MIGO) but you need set customizing “Activate Synchronous Goods Movements in the Warehouse” to prevent delivery creation.

entry.title: Re: SAP Hana Express licence with more than 32GB
entry.content: @akullerThe upgrade options of SAP HANA, express edition, were discontinued a few years ago due to the very low interest in such upgrades in the ecosystem. Regards. --Witalij

entry.title: IBP OBP Custom attribute in /IBP/MARC_EXT
entry.content:
Hello,

In IBP R&S we are using SAP7 for planning areas based on external master data. In S/4 ECC the CUST_ATTR4 field of table /IBP/MARC_EXT is of type date, while in IBP we have an attribute of type CHAR(10).

Is possible to modify the data element of the CUST_ATTR4 field in table /IBP/MARC_EXT?

Since the other Custom attributes are already valued for other purposes and only this one remains on which we should be able to bring a char field (and not a date) into IBP. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Integration to a BTP destination in SAP Build Apps is...
entry.content: Seems to be working fine to me. Getting 200 OK, screenshot attached.

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Internal error: SQL View - Resource governor for 'cursors' exceeded
entry.content:
I am not familiar with this error, but from what I can read, it is using a connection to SAP HANA Cloud, DL RE (based on SAP IQ database technology) as a component of Datasphere. It should be related to that setting: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_DATA_LAKE/19b3964099384f178ad08f2d348232a9/a63e2b9784f21015983992c1d7a76694.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION

I do not know if you can manipulate a number of these temporary tables to reduce the number of cursors they open simultaneously. If not, then I would suggest opening a service case to SAP Support.

Regards.

If you could help with any blog /  tutorial.

entry.title: MM EWM failed goods receipt
entry.content:
Hello,

 

There is an integration MM-EWM. We have the following situation: Purchase order was created. Goods receipt was done.

in EWM it was posted successfully (via inbound delivery)

in S4 there is no GR for the Purchase order. So, because of some reason, EWM failed to send GR to S4. 

Later stock was correct in S4 by movement type 712.

It was in the past and already does not meter the reasons of the issue.  So now we have Purchase order without any posted material documents.

The question: is it possible somehow to assign/update posted document to Purchase order? Because we need to create invoice and further things.

entry.title: Re: Dun & Bradstreet(DnB) integration With SAP MDG
entry.content:
Based on customer demand, Alluvion has built a SAP-certified SAP MDG Dun & Bradstreet connector.

SAP MDG D&B Connector 

You might want to look into this, instead of developing a connector yourself.

entry.title: Re: Thermal Printer set up in SAP Build Apps' apps
entry.content:
Hello Sankara

I just have data variables for which I need to get them printed, the data is being stored and retrieved from firestore.

entry.title: Re: CJ88/CJ8G-Controlling the amount of money to be settled
entry.content:
Hi SKnii

Honestly, I couldn't understand the scenario. It seems really strange to me.

In any case, there's no way to control the amount during the execution of CJ88/CJ8G, only through the settlement rule. It's possible to assign a settlement rule to a WBS element by amount. This way, for each settlement, you can create a new settlement rule with the desired amount, making the previous rule "inactive." After updating the settlement rule, you can proceed with the settlement execution.

Regards
Marcio Blos

Gurleen Kaur

entry.title: Re: CJ88/CJ8G-Controlling the amount of money to be settled
entry.content: Won't you settle 100% of the amount in the WBS element? Is that correct from an accounting perspective?
